name: Yankee Beans- Lenten
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pressure cooker, combine the navy beans, water, and olive oil. Pressure cook for 30 minutes using the Quick Release Method. Drain and rinse.
2. Microwave onions, carrots, and celery until the onions are soft.
3. Transfer cooked vegetables to a slow cooker.
4. Add tomato sauce, mustard, and molasses. Mix well.
5. Add the drained beans. Mix thoroughly.
6. Use a degreasing cup to strain bean broth, then add enough of this broth to barely cover the mixture. Stir.
7. Slow cook on high for 3-4 hours.
